textline_cells.text: Recipe by: Laura Vitale
textline_cells.orig: Recipe by: Laura Vitale

textline_cells.text: Serves 8
textline_cells.orig: Serves 8

textline_cells.text: Prep Time: 20 minutes
textline_cells.orig: Prep Time: 20 minutes

textline_cells.text: Cook Time: 30 minutes
textline_cells.orig: Cook Time: 30 minutes

textline_cells.text: Ingredients
textline_cells.orig: Ingredients

textline_cells.text: __2 Sheets of Puff Pastry
textline_cells.orig: __2 Sheets of Puff Pastry

textline_cells.text: __1 lb of Ground Sausage
textline_cells.orig: __1 lb of Ground Sausage

textline_cells.text: __3 Fresh Sage Leaves
textline_cells.orig: __3 Fresh Sage Leaves

textline_cells.text: __1/4 cup of Fresh Parsley
textline_cells.orig: __1/4 cup of Fresh Parsley

textline_cells.text: __1 Large or 2 Small Cloves of Garlic
textline_cells.orig: __1 Large or 2 Small Cloves of Garlic

textline_cells.text: __1 Egg, separated
textline_cells.orig: __1 Egg, separated

textline_cells.text: __Salt and Pepper, to taste
textline_cells.orig: __Salt and Pepper, to taste

textline_cells.text: 1) Preheat your oven to 375 degrees, line
textline_cells.orig: 1) Preheat your oven to 375 degrees, line

textline_cells.text: 2 baking sheets with parchment paper and
textline_cells.orig: 2 baking sheets with parchment paper and

textline_cells.text: set aside.
textline_cells.orig: set aside.

textline_cells.text: 2) Add the sage, parsley and garlic in a
textline_cells.orig: 2) Add the sage, parsley and garlic in a

textline_cells.text: mini chopper (or finely chopped by hand)
textline_cells.orig: mini chopper (or finely chopped by hand)

textline_cells.text: and pulse until finely chopped.
textline_cells.orig: and pulse until finely chopped.

textline_cells.text: 3) In a large bowl, mix together the
textline_cells.orig: 3) In a large bowl, mix together the

textline_cells.text: sausage, herb and garlic mixture, egg
textline_cells.orig: sausage, herb and garlic mixture, egg

textline_cells.text: white and a small pinch of salt and pepper,
textline_cells.orig: white and a small pinch of salt and pepper,

textline_cells.text: set aside. Meanwhile, in a small bowl,
textline_cells.orig: set aside. Meanwhile, in a small bowl,

textline_cells.text: whisk the egg yolk with a couple tablespoons of water to make the egg
textline_cells.orig: whisk the egg yolk with a couple tablespoons of water to make the egg

textline_cells.text: wash and set aside.
textline_cells.orig: wash and set aside.

textline_cells.text: 4) Lay out each piece of puff pastry on a lightly floured surface and roll it
textline_cells.orig: 4) Lay out each piece of puff pastry on a lightly floured surface and roll it

textline_cells.text: with a rolling pin to make it about 1/2 longer on the top and bottom, cut
textline_cells.orig: with a rolling pin to make it about 1/2 longer on the top and bottom, cut

textline_cells.text: the puff pastry sheet in half lengthwise, take half of the sausage mixture,
textline_cells.orig: the puff pastry sheet in half lengthwise, take half of the sausage mixture,

textline_cells.text: place it lengthwise in the center of the puff pastry forming it into a log as
textline_cells.orig: place it lengthwise in the center of the puff pastry forming it into a log as

textline_cells.text: you go.
textline_cells.orig: you go.

textline_cells.text: 5) Brush the sides with some of the egg wash, place the other half of the
textline_cells.orig: 5) Brush the sides with some of the egg wash, place the other half of the

textline_cells.text: puff pastry on top, seal the sides by using a fork and dipping it in flour
textline_cells.orig: puff pastry on top, seal the sides by using a fork and dipping it in flour

textline_cells.text: and then cut out your slices of sausage rolls, place them on your
textline_cells.orig: and then cut out your slices of sausage rolls, place them on your

textline_cells.text: prepared baking sheet and set aside.
textline_cells.orig: prepared baking sheet and set aside.

textline_cells.text: 6) Repeat with the remaining filling and pastry, then brush all the tops
textline_cells.orig: 6) Repeat with the remaining filling and pastry, then brush all the tops

textline_cells.text: with the egg wash, sprinkle the tops with a touch of salt and pepper and
textline_cells.orig: with the egg wash, sprinkle the tops with a touch of salt and pepper and

textline_cells.text: bake the rolls for about half an hour or until golden brown all over.
textline_cells.orig: bake the rolls for about half an hour or until golden brown all over.
